I am very disappointed with the service of INDmoney. Today my shares were sold without any prior information or notification. I did not receive any message, email, or alert before this transaction happened. As a user, I expect transparency and proper communication regarding my investments. Selling shares without informing the account holder creates confusion and loss of trust. I request the INDmoney team to explain why this happened and make sure such actions are not taken without informing th

I love the app. The app is so much faster download. Thank you so much to everyone. This is syncing happens pretty much every time you open the app, start, stop, or edit an entry, so it was a real pain. But now download faster and more stable. Not to mention being unable to use the app when it's syncing because its literally stop responding until it's done. You'd stop an entry and it'd be several seconds before it'd actually stop and those extra seconds are added too the entry.

I love the app.! The app is so much faster download. But now download faster and more stable. Thank you so much to everyone algorithms. You d stop an entry and it d be several seconds before it d actually stop and those extra seconds are added to the entry. Not to mention being unable to use the app when it s syncing because it literally stops responding until it s done.! This syncing happens pretty much every time you open the app, start, stop, or edit an entry so it was a real pain to use.

This is the best app for traders and investors for the long term because in this app brokerage charges are so negligible. I love the app. Thank you so much to everyone. The app is soo much faster download. But now download faster and more stable. This syncing happens pretty much every time you open the app, start, stop, or edit an entry, so it used to be a real pain to use. I frequently use INDmoney for loan repayments, but I am disappointed that it doesn't allow partial or custom amount payments. Currently, the app forces users to pay the full outstanding amount at once. Other payment apps allow us to make smaller advance payments (e.g., paying 200 towards a 1000 loan). Adding a flexible payment option where users can enter their own amount would be extremely helpful for managing finances. I hope the INDmoney team implements this feature soon.
I'm delighted with the experience in the Indmoney app. They provide cashback in each transaction which can be used in recharges. The ui is also good.

I am very grateful to the INDmoney app. I had recently filed a complaint regarding the arrangement of tabs in the app's UI, and I am truly amazed that, on the very next day, my issue was resolved. The team responded immediately, listened to my concerns carefully, and implemented the correction perfectly. Their work is truly exceptional, and the product designers did an amazing job. I must praise the INDmoney team for solving this issue so quickly and professionally.

The app has useful financial features, but the overall user interface needs serious improvement. The font size is too large, which makes the screen look cluttered and uncomfortable to view. The layout and overall design feel messy and not well-structured. It would be much better if the developers reduce the font size and redesign the layout to make it clean, simple, and easy to understand at first glance. A more organized and minimal interface would greatly improve the user experience.

SUBJECT: Request to Improve Exit Button Safety and Add Commodity Segment The current one-click exit feature is very sensitive; even while scrolling through positions, an accidental touch can trigger an unintended exit. Introducing an additional confirmation mechanism would significantly improve trading safety. Additionally, the absence of the commodity segment forces users to open another demat account with a different broker. kindly review my request and awaiting your response

Reporting a UI rendering bug on the tablet version. In the top navigation bar where the active scrip tabs are located (e.g., HINDZINC), the text labels and the "X" close buttons are misaligned and overlapping. Specifically, any annotations made in this header/tab area are not showing up correctly or are being cut off by the UI layer. This makes it impossible to manage multiple tabs or use drawing tools near the top of the chart. Please fix the header scaling for tablet layout. Redmi Tab 2 pro
